title: Food Factory
subTitle: Discover how Canadian butter tarts, leaf-shaped maple syrup candies, ice cream and Canadian Caesar drinks are made, from raw materials to finished products.

title: Food Factory USA
subTitle: Head to Gloucester, Massachusetts, where one of America's longest-running companies reveals the secret to making golden square-shaped fish fillets.

title: Ancient Unexplained Files
subTitle: A temple to the Roman god of the underworld is the site of ritual sacrifice and a gate to the underworld, but it was buried because it was believed to be cursed; experts use cutting-edge forensics to reveal what actually happened here.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: Michael visits Dr. Sarah to see if she can help with his twisted toes. Robyn has corns on her feet and hopes Dr. Brad can cut them out so she'll be able to walk pain free once again. Richard sees Dr. Ebonie for issues related to his missing big toe.

title: The Bad Skin Clinic
subTitle: Dr Emma provides effective treatment for the persistent skin issue that Mel has struggled with since her early years.

title: Real Time Crime
subTitle: A shooting in Mississippi leaves a man fighting for his life, and police must use gunshot detection technology to track the shooter before he strikes again. Plus, in South Carolina, RTCC cameras capture a deadly bar brawl.

title: Haunted Towns
subTitle: The team investigates Gettysburg, Pennsylvania, site of the bloodiest battle of the Civil War, and try to make contact with the souls of these fallen American soldiers.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: Michael visits Dr. Sarah to see if she can help with his twisted toes. Robyn has corns on her feet and hopes Dr. Brad can cut them out so she'll be able to walk pain free once again. Richard sees Dr. Ebonie for issues related to his missing big toe.

title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
subTitle: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fuelling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: Discover how spicy barbeque sauce, veggie burgers, fresh pineapple pieces and relish are made, from raw materials to finished products.

title: Food Factory USA
subTitle: The making of cheesy foods: including goat cheese, cheddar bunny crackers, cheese doodles, crispy mozzarella sticks and Papa John's Pizza.

title: Alien Encounters
subTitle: Based on found alien instructions, scientists build a powerful quantum computer that can enhance the senses of the human/alien hybrid children.

title: Dr. Pimple Popper
subTitle: Yaellie, a sweet 9-year-old, has itchy psoriasis on over 90 percent of her body. Matt, a former Marine, has a large recurring lump in his armpit. Twins Tracie and Stacie have numerous matching bumps on their heads that sometimes leak.

title: Deadliest Catch
subTitle: A massive arctic hurricane shocks the fleet with high winds and big waves. An unstable stack threatens to capsize the Saga, as the captains rush to pull and set pots before harbour.

title: Ghost Adventures
subTitle: Zak Bagans, Aaron Goodwin, Billy Tolley and Jay Wasley investigate the most haunted places in the world, during the dusk-to-dawn lockdown, the crew documents key evidence to uncover the truth behind paranormal activity.

title: SciJinks
subTitle: Johnny Galecki and his genius team of pranksters engineer a chemical emergency and find out how what happens when mind control goes wrong.

title: SciJinks
subTitle: Johnny Galecki and his genius team of pranksters find out what happens when mind-controlled cars go rogue and how a simple recipe can turn into a kitchen nightmare.

title: How It's Made
subTitle: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how mini GP motorcycles, fig biscuits, tool boxes and pipe bends are made.

title: SciJinks
subTitle: Johnny Galecki and his genius team of pranksters use drones for high-stakes mischief and find out what happens when beer-making goes wrong.

title: SciJinks
subTitle: Johnny Galecki and his team of pranksters discover what happens when a 3D printer makes a permanent mistake and how simple chemistry can cause serious mischief.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: Pickled asparagus, chilli-chocolate caramels, chocolate coffee syrup, ready-to-eat beetroots are made, from raw materials to finished products.

title: Food Factory USA
subTitle: Head to North Carolina, home of a picklicious plant that produces pickled pepperoncini peppers. Plus, uncover the secret blend of New Yorker Bagels.

title: Ancient Unexplained Files
subTitle: A mass grave of mutilated skeletons is unearthed at the frontier of the Roman Empire, experts use advanced digital analysis to reveal the mystery behind these grisly remains.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: Dr. Schaeffer, Dr. Haller and Dr. Vincent deck the halls and hang the mistletoes in this special episode filled with holiday cheer and shocking new cases.

title: The Bad Skin Clinic
subTitle: Thai, an 18-year-old, has put his modelling career on hold due to keloids growing on both ears. Joyce has hidden a large lump behind her ear for over 40 years, terrified it might be cancer. Now, she is ready to seek help from Dr Emma.

title: Real Time Crime
subTitle: In New York City, surveillance cameras help track down a trio of bandits after a daring heist of a Pay-o-Matic in Queens. In Colorado, a makeshift Real Time Crime Center helps solve the murder of 27-year-old Andrew Jenicek outside a restaurant.

title: Haunted Towns
subTitle: The team head to Bisbee, Arizona, to investigate the old mining town's rough past. They head underground for the first time in their paranormal careers.

title: You Have Been Warned Again
subTitle: Bringing you the very best of viral video madness. Hold on to your helmets with the craziest drivers the world has ever seen.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: We celebrate Thanksgiving with four holiday favourites: Pepperidge Farms' stuffing, delicious pumpkin pie, crispy marshmallow treats, and cranberry sauce.

title: Food Factory USA
subTitle: Visit Big League Chew, Baltimore's historic horseradish, and a cupcake factory that was put in the spotlight following a national security incident.

title: How the Universe Works
subTitle: White dwarfs are small, dead stars with a dangerous side, capable of exploding into supernovas and destroying planets; new research suggests these mysterious phenomena may be the key to understanding the universe itself.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: A woman with a two-pound mass in her foot, a man with pasta-shaped toenails, and a woman with heels like rocks has the doctors scratching their heads and holding their noses.

title: Skin Tight
subTitle: Linda hopes skin removal surgery will give her self-esteem to be a role model to her daughters. Angel hates her extra skin because it's turning her into an introvert.

title: Bering Sea Gold
subTitle: The Bering Sea battle intensifies as Shawn bets big on a new discovery. The Kellys are forced to find new ground and Emily nearly boils a diver alive.

title: Haunted Towns
subTitle: The team are in unchartered territory as they go to Montana. They're investigating the streets of Virginia City, known for its mass hangings and excessive crime.

title: How It's Made
subTitle: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how golf clubs, waffles, custom wires and cables and train wheels are made.

title: You Have Been Warned Again
subTitle: Bringing you the very best of viral video madness. Unleash the beast with the wildest nature videos the world has ever seen.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: We celebrate Thanksgiving with four holiday favourites: Pepperidge Farms' stuffing, delicious pumpkin pie, crispy marshmallow treats, and cranberry sauce.

title: Food Factory USA
subTitle: Production secrets behind a million cups of applesauce annually, ultra-creamy fudge at America's longest-running family candy maker, and a billion crispy onion rings.

title: How the Universe Works
subTitle: The galaxy is full of stars ready to explode into supernovas, a stellar detonation powerful enough to destroy all life on Earth; it's an event that hasn't occurred in 400 years, and the search is on to locate which star may be next.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: Cindy is desperate to have Dr Brad fix her stumpy foot and get back to skiing. Gregory has open wounds on both feet and hopes Dr Ebonie can heal them. Glen's feet are split down the middle.

title: Skin Tight
subTitle: Shantel must get rid of her excess skin if she's to set a positive example for her daughter. Hope's obsession with weight loss could affect her chances of surgery.

title: Bering Sea Gold
subTitle: Shawn works overtime to cover for his crew who are simply exhausted and Kris is blindsided by the loss of his lead diver. Meanwhile, Emily jumps in to try and help prevent a fuel spill.

title: Haunted Towns
subTitle: The team head to Port Townsend, Washington. Here, they investigate the crimes, curses and angry spirits that locals believe are haunting the town.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: We celebrate Thanksgiving with four holiday favourites: Pepperidge Farms' stuffing, delicious pumpkin pie, crispy marshmallow treats, and cranberry sauce.
